description: Define a Meter model with an id and location, and a DailyEnergyReport model that references a meter and includes the date and total energy consumed in kWh.

Define an AccountNumber and OwnerName as string-derived types, a LifecycleStatus enum with ACTIVE, FROZEN, and CLOSED states, and a BankAccount model with accountNumber, ownerName, balance (as a semantic Decimal type), status, createdAt, and lastModifiedAt fields.
taxi:
type AccountNumber inherits String
type OwnerName inherits String
type Balance inherits Decimal
type CreatedAt inherits Instant
enum LifecycleStatus { ACTIVE, FROZEN, CLOSED }
model BankAccount {
  accountNumber : AccountNumber
  ownerName : OwnerName
  balance : Balance
  status : LifecycleStatus
  createdAt : CreatedAt
  lastModifiedAt : Instant
}

description: Define a RideRequest model with id, passenger name, pickup location, dropoff location, and status; create a RideRequestService with CRUD operations: createRideRequest, getRideRequestById, updateRideRequest, and deleteRideRequest.
taxi:
type RideRequestId inherits String
type PassengerName inherits String
type Location inherits String
enum RideStatus { PENDING, ACCEPTED, IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED, CANCELLED }
model RideRequest {
  id : RideRequestId
  passengerName : PassengerName
  pickupLocation : Location
  dropoffLocation : Location
  status : RideStatus
}
service RideRequestService {
  operation createRideRequest(request : RideRequest) : RideRequestId
  operation getRideRequestById(id : RideRequestId) : RideRequest
  operation updateRideRequest(id : RideRequestId, request : RideRequest) : RideRequest
  operation deleteRideRequest(id : RideRequestId) : Boolean
}

description: Define a Product model with an id, name, and current stock level, then query all products to project only their names and stock levels.

Define a TransactionReport model for banking aggregations, including transactionId (String-derived), amount (Decimal), timestamp (Instant), category (TransactionCategory enum alias), merchantName (String), and a flag indicating if it's recurring.
taxi:
type TransactionId inherits String
type Amount inherits Decimal
model TransactionReport {
  transactionId : TransactionId
  amount : Amount
  timestamp : Instant
  category : String
  merchantName : String
  isRecurring : Boolean
}

description: Define a StockItem model for inventory tracking, with fields for item_id (a string-based identifier), name, quantity_in_stock, reorder_threshold, last_restocked (a date), and category (a string).
taxi:
type ItemId inherits String
type Category inherits String
model StockItem {
  item_id : ItemId
  name : String
  quantity_in_stock : Int
  reorder_threshold : Int
  last_restocked : Date
  category : Category
}

description: Define a Patient model with id, name, and age; then query all patients and project only their names and ages.
Define a banking audit logging subdomain with types for user identifiers and action codes, an enum for log severity levels, a model for audit events, and a service to record and retrieve them.
Define core entities for a social platform: a User model with profile info, a Post model linking to a user and containing text and timestamp, and a Comment model linking to both a post and a user.
taxi:
type UserId inherits String
type PostId inherits String
type CommentId inherits String
model User {
  id : UserId
  username : String
  displayName : String?
}
model Post {
  id : PostId
  authorId : UserId
  content : String
  createdAt : Instant
}
model Comment {
  id : CommentId
  postId : PostId
  authorId : UserId
  content : String
  createdAt : Instant
}

description: Define a reporting subdomain for HR with employee counts by department, average salary calculations, and a summary report model.
Define an AccountStatus enum (OPEN, CLOSED, FROZEN) and an Account model with an id (AccountId, a string-derived type), a balance (Decimal), and a status.
Define a User model with an id, email, and a nested Profile containing firstName and lastName; Profile should be a separate model referenced by User.
Define a Publication model with an id and a lifecycle state (Draft, PendingReview, Published), and a Review model that references a Publication via its id.
Define a UserAuthentication subdomain for a rideshare app, including user roles (RIDER, DRIVER), a User model with id and role, an AuthToken type, and an AuthService with login and logout operations.
Define an AuditLog model that records an action, timestamp, and the user who performed it (referencing a User model with an id and name).

Define an HR subdomain for tracking employee inventory: create types for EmployeeId and DepartmentName, an enum for EmploymentStatus, a model for Employee with fields for id, department, and status, and a service to look up employees by their ID.
Define a Course model with an id (CourseId, a string-derived type), title, description, start and end dates, and a lifecycle state (DRAFT, PUBLISHED, ARCHIVED).
taxi:
type CourseId inherits String
type Title inherits String
type Description inherits String
enum LifecycleState { DRAFT, PUBLISHED, ARCHIVED }
model Course {
  id : CourseId
  title : Title
  description : Description?
  startDate : Date
  endDate : Date
  lifecycleState : LifecycleState
}

description: Define a healthcare subdomain with core entity records: a Patient model (with id, name, and date of birth), a Provider model (with id, name, and specialty), and an Appointment model linking a patient and provider with a datetime and status.
Define a Notification annotation with fields for message (String) and priority (Int), and apply it to a TravelItinerary model.

Define a Shipment model with id, carrier (from CarrierCode enum), and status; a ShipmentRequest model for new shipments; and a SupplyChainIntegration service with operations to get status and submit shipments, plus a WebhookEndpoint annotation.
Create a StockService with an operation getStockLevel that takes a ProductId and returns the current stock quantity as an integer.
Define an AuditEventLevel enum (INFO, WARN, ERROR) and an AuditEvent model with a timestamp, level, and message.
Create an EmployeeLifecycleService with operations to start employment (takes employeeId and returns void) and to terminate employment (takes employeeId and reason, returns void).

Define an ExternalPaymentProvider service with CRUD operations for PaymentIntents: createIntent (takes amount and currency, returns IntentId), getIntent (takes IntentId, returns PaymentIntent), updateIntent (takes IntentId and status, returns Boolean), deleteIntent (takes IntentId, returns Boolean).
taxi:
type IntentId inherits String
type CurrencyCode inherits String
model PaymentIntent {
  id : IntentId
  amount : Decimal
  currency : CurrencyCode
  status : String
}
service ExternalPaymentProvider {
  operation createIntent(amount : Decimal, currency : CurrencyCode) : IntentId
  operation getIntent(id : IntentId) : PaymentIntent
  operation updateIntent(id : IntentId, status : String) : Boolean
  operation deleteIntent(id : IntentId) : Boolean
}

description: Define a telecom audit logging subdomain with types for user identifiers and action codes, an AuditLog model capturing event details, an enum for log severity levels, and a service to query logs by user or date range.
Define a Ride model with id, driverId (String), passengerId (String), fare (Decimal), and completedAt (Instant); then query for all rides to project only driverId, passengerId, and fare as a list.
taxi:
type RideId inherits String
type DriverId inherits String
type PassengerId inherits String
model Ride {
  id : RideId
  driverId : DriverId
  passengerId : PassengerId
  fare : Decimal
  completedAt : Instant?
}
find { Ride[] } as {
  driverId : DriverId
  passengerId : PassengerId
  fare : Decimal
}

description: Create a BillingService with CRUD operations for Payment records: createPayment, getPaymentById, updatePayment, and deletePayment.

Define types for NotificationId, Title, and Message; models for NewNotification (with required fields), UpdatedNotification (with nullable fields), and Notification (with id, title, and message); and a NotificationService with create, get, update, and delete operations.

Define an AuditLog model for tracking supply chain events, with fields for a unique log ID (LogId), timestamp (EventTime), actor name (ActorName), action performed (Action), affected entity ID (EntityId), and optional metadata (Metadata).
taxi:
type LogId inherits String
type EventTime inherits Instant
type ActorName inherits String
type Action inherits String
type EntityId inherits String
type Metadata inherits String
model AuditLog {
  id : LogId
  timestamp : EventTime
  actor : ActorName
  action : Action
  entityId : EntityId?
  metadata : Metadata?
}

description: Define an AuditLog model with id, action (a string), and timestamp; then query for all audit logs.
Create a TransactionService with an operation searchTransactions that takes a customerId (String) and returns a list of Transaction records.

Create a SupplyChainReportService with an operation getTotalInventory that returns the total inventory count across all warehouses, and another operation getShipmentSummary that takes a date range and returns a summary of shipments.
Define primitive-derived alias types for student identifiers, course codes, and grade percentages used in external education system integrations.
taxi:
type StudentId inherits String
type CourseCode inherits String
type GradePercentage inherits Decimal

description: Create a BillingService with an operation calculateTotal that takes an OrderId and returns the total amount as a Decimal, and another operation processPayment that takes an OrderId and a PaymentMethod string and returns a Boolean indicating success.

Define a Payment model for a fintech billing system with fields: paymentId (a string-derived ID), amount (a decimal), currency (a 3-letter code), status (an enum: PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED), createdAt (a timestamp), and customerId (a string-derived ID).
taxi:
type PaymentId inherits String
type CustomerId inherits String
enum PaymentStatus { PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED }
model Payment {
  paymentId : PaymentId
  amount : Decimal
  currency : String
  status : PaymentStatus
  createdAt : Instant
  customerId : CustomerId
}

description: Define a Report model with an id, title, and a list of Aggregation entries; each Aggregation has a name and a numeric value.
Create a TravelReportService with an operation totalBookingsByMonth that takes a year (Int) and month (Int) and returns the total number of bookings as an Int.

Define a Payment model for an e-commerce system with fields: paymentId (a string-derived type), orderId, amount (a decimal), currency (a 3-letter code), status (an enum: PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED), and createdAt (a timestamp).
taxi:
type PaymentId inherits String
type OrderId inherits String
type CurrencyCode inherits String
enum PaymentStatus { PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED }
model Payment {
  paymentId : PaymentId
  orderId : OrderId
  amount : Decimal
  currency : CurrencyCode
  status : PaymentStatus
  createdAt : Instant
}

description: Define a StockStatus enum (IN_STOCK, LOW_STOCK, OUT_OF_STOCK) and an InventoryItem model with a productId (String), currentQuantity (Int), and status (StockStatus).
Create an AuthService with operations login (takes username and password, returns a String token) and logout (takes a token string and returns Boolean).
Define a Trade model with an id, symbol, quantity, and price; and a TradeReport model that includes the trade details plus a computed total value (quantity * price) and a timestamp.
taxi:
type TradeId inherits String
model Trade {
  id : TradeId
  symbol : String
  quantity : Int
  price : Decimal
}
model TradeReport {
  tradeId : TradeId
  symbol : String
  quantity : Int
  price : Decimal
  totalValue : Decimal
  timestamp : Instant
}

description: Create a TravelSearchService with CRUD operations for Destination records, where each destination has an id (string), name, description, and a list of tags.

Create a BillingService with CRUD operations for invoices: createInvoice, getInvoice, updateInvoice, and deleteInvoice. Invoices have an id (String), amount (Decimal), status (PAID, UNPAID, OVERDUE), and dueDate.

Define types for a gaming system: PlayerId, GameSessionId, InventoryItemId as strings; Rarity enum with COMMON, RARE, EPIC, LEGENDARY values; GameId and Timestamp (as Instant); Player model with id and name; GameSession model with id, player reference, game reference, start time, and optional end time; InventoryItem model with id, player reference, game reference, quantity, and rarity.
taxi:
type PlayerId inherits String
type GameSessionId inherits String
type InventoryItemId inherits String
enum Rarity { COMMON, RARE, EPIC, LEGENDARY }
type GameId inherits String
type Timestamp inherits Instant
model Player {
  id : PlayerId
  name : String
}
model GameSession {
  id : GameSessionId
  player : PlayerId
  game : GameId
  startTime : Timestamp
  endTime : Timestamp?
}
model InventoryItem {
  id : InventoryItemId
  playerId : PlayerId
  gameId : GameId
  quantity : Int
  rarity : Rarity
}

description: Define a Shipment model with id, origin, destination, and status; then query shipments to project only the origin and destination fields.

Define a Ride model with id, driverId (String), passengerId (String), distanceInKm (Decimal), and fareAmount (Decimal). Then write a TaxiQL query to find all rides with distance greater than 10 km and compute the total fare amount.
Define an AuditAction enum (CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE) and an AuditLog model with fields for action, timestamp, and user.

Define a RideRequest model with id, passenger name, pickup location, dropoff location, and status; create a RideRequestService with CRUD operations: createRideRequest, getRideRequestById, updateRideRequest, and deleteRideRequest.
taxi:
type RideRequestId inherits String

enum RideStatus { PENDING, ACCEPTED, IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED, CANCELLED }
model RideRequest {

service RideRequestService {
  operation createRideRequest(request : RideRequest) : RideRequestId
  operation getRideRequestById(id : RideRequestId) : RideRequest
  operation updateRideRequest(id : RideRequestId, request : RideRequest) : RideRequest
  operation deleteRideRequest(id : RideRequestId) : Boolean
}

description: Define a BankAccount model with an accountNumber (AccountId, a string-derived type), ownerName, balance (Decimal), isOpen status, and createdAt timestamp.

type OwnerName inherits String
model BankAccount {
  accountNumber : AccountId
  ownerName : OwnerName
  balance : Decimal

}

description: Define an Employee model with a name and a current lifecycle state (Active, OnLeave, Terminated), and an EmploymentHistory model that records past states with timestamps.

Define a RideRequest model with id, passenger name, pickup location, dropoff location, and status; create a RideRequestService with CRUD operations: createRideRequest, getRideRequestById, updateRideRequest, and deleteRideRequest.
taxi:
type RideRequestId inherits String
type PassengerName inherits String
type Location inherits String
enum RideStatus { PENDING, ACCEPTED, IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED, CANCELLED }
model RideRequest {

description: Define a StockItem model for inventory tracking with fields: sku (a string identifier), quantityInStock, reorderThreshold, lastRestockedDate, supplierName, and isActive status.

type SKU inherits String

model StockItem {
  sku : SKU
  quantityInStock : Quantity
  reorderThreshold : ReorderThreshold
  lastRestockedDate : LastRestockedDate?
  supplierName : SupplierName
  isActive : IsActive
}

description: Define a Content model with id, title, status (using an enum), and optional publishedDate; plus a ContentService with CRUD operations and a search operation that accepts optional title and status filters.
Define an AuditLog model with fields for id (a string), action (an enum of CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE), timestamp, and actorEmail; then query for all audit logs with action CREATE.
Define a Ride model with an id, passenger name, and status; then query for all rides with status ACTIVE.
Define a User model with an id (UserId, a string-derived type), email, and active status; then query for all active users.
Define an AuditLog model that records a user action with a timestamp and a reference to the User who performed it, where User has an id and name.
Create an EnergyGridService with operations to get grid status (returns String) and to submit a power usage reading (takes an Instant timestamp and Decimal value).
Define a Device model with id, name, and status fields; then query all devices and project only their names and statuses.
Define a Notification model with id, recipientEmail, and message fields, then query all notifications and project only the recipientEmail and message.
Define a Product model with id, name, and price; then query all products and project only their names and prices.
Create an AuditLogService with operations to record a player action (playerId, actionType, timestamp) and to retrieve all logs for a given playerId.
Define a Notification model with id, title, and body fields, then write a TaxiQL query to find all notifications and project only their titles and bodies.

Create an InventoryService with CRUD operations: createItem, readItem, updateItem, and deleteItem for StockItems. A StockItem has an id (ItemId), name, quantity (an integer), and a lastUpdated timestamp.
Define a Trip model with an id, name, and lifecycle state (DRAFT, CONFIRMED, COMPLETED), then query all trips projected to show only their id and lifecycle state.
Define an EnergySource enum (SOLAR, WIND, COAL, NATURAL_GAS) and a PowerPlant model with an id (String), name, and source type.
Define a ShipmentStatus enum (PENDING, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED, CANCELLED) and a ShipmentReport model with an id (ShipmentId), status, and estimated delivery date.
Define a PostStatus enum (DRAFT, PUBLISHED, ARCHIVED) and a Post model with an id (PostId, derived from String) and a status field.

Define a Transaction model with an id (TransactionId, a string-derived type), amount (Decimal), and status (TransactionStatus enum: PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED). Then create a TransactionService with CRUD operations: createTransaction (takes amount and status, returns Transaction), getTransaction (by id, returns Transaction), updateTransaction (id, amount, status — returns Transaction), and deleteTransaction (by id).

Create an ExternalMarketDataService with an operation getQuote that takes a TickerSymbol string and returns a Price decimal, and another operation getHistoricalPrices that takes a TickerSymbol and a Date range (start and end) and returns an array of Price values.
Define a ContentStatus enum (DRAFT, PUBLISHED, ARCHIVED) and a ContentItem model with an id, title, and status.
Define a BookInventory model for tracking books in a school library, with fields for id (BookId), title, author, isbn (ISBN13), current stock level, and last updated timestamp.
taxi:
type BookId inherits String
type ISBN13 inherits String
model BookInventory {
  id : BookId
  title : String
  author : String
  isbn : ISBN13
  stockLevel : Int
  lastUpdated : Instant
}

description: Define a PaymentStatus enum (PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED) for external payment gateway integrations and a RidePayment model that includes an id, amount, and status.

Create an InventoryService with CRUD operations for StockItem: createStockItem, getStockItemById, updateStockItem, and deleteStockItem. StockItem has an id (ItemId), name, quantity (non-negative integer), and a lastUpdated timestamp.

Define a fintech subdomain for searching and filtering transactions: create types for TransactionId, Amount, and CurrencyCode; an enum for TransactionStatus; a model for Transaction with fields id, amount (decimal), currency, status, and timestamp; and a TransactionsSearchService with an operation search that accepts optional filters (status, minAmount, maxAmount) and returns a list of transactions.

Define a PatientReport model for healthcare reporting with fields: reportId (a string-based identifier), patientId, dateOfReport (a Date), diagnosisCode (a string), severityLevel (an integer scale 1-5), and summary (optional text).
taxi:
type ReportId inherits String
type PatientId inherits String

model PatientReport {
  reportId : ReportId
  patientId : PatientId
  dateOfReport : Date
  diagnosisCode : String
  severityLevel : SeverityLevel
  summary : String?
}

description: Create an AuditLogService with CRUD operations for audit logs: createAuditLog (takes a LogEntry and returns it), getAuditLog (by Id, returns LogEntry), updateAuditLog (updates the entry), and deleteAuditLog (by Id). Define LogEntry as a model with id, timestamp, action, and actor fields.
Define a Patient model with an id and name, and a BillingRecord model that references a Patient via patientId and includes an amountDue (Decimal) and a description.
Define primitive-derived alias types for a billing system: Amount (a decimal), CurrencyCode (a string), InvoiceId (a string), and PaymentStatus (an enum with values PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED).

type CurrencyCode inherits String

description: Define a Payment model with an id (PaymentId, a string-derived type), amount, and status; then query for all payments with status COMPLETED.

Define an external integration for farm sensor data, including a SensorId type, a SensorReading model (with timestamp and value), an enum for reading types (TEMPERATURE, HUMIDITY, SOIL_MOISTURE), and a SensorService with an operation to fetch recent readings by sensor.
Define a Course model with an id and title, and a CourseLifecycleState model that tracks the current state (DRAFT, PUBLISHED, ARCHIVED) and includes a reference to the Course.
Define a Flight model with an id, departure and arrival airports (each as AirportCode strings), and a reference to a Passenger model for the booked traveler.

Define a Trade model with an id (TradeId, a string-derived type), a symbol (TickerSymbol), quantity (Quantity as an integer), price (Price as a decimal), status (TradeStatus enum: OPEN, FILLED, CANCELLED), and timestamp (Created at as an instant).

model Trade {
  id : TradeId

  quantity : Quantity

  status : TradeStatus
  createdAt : Instant
}

Define a notifications subdomain with user preferences, notification types, and a service to send/retrieve notifications for users.
Define a ContentReport model with title, viewCount, and authorName fields, then query all content items projected into this report format.
Define primitive-derived alias types for notification IDs, recipient email addresses, and notification status (PENDING, SENT, FAILED).

Create a PatientService with an operation getPatientById that takes a PatientId string and returns a Patient record, and another operation listPatientsByStatus that takes a Status enum and returns an array of Patients.
Define a Transaction model with id, amount (Decimal), and status; then query all transactions and project only their ids and amounts.
Define a User model for authentication with fields: userId (UserId, derived from String), email (EmailAddress), passwordHash (String), createdAt (Instant), and isActive (Boolean).
taxi:
type UserId inherits String
type EmailAddress inherits String
type PasswordHash inherits String
model User {
  userId : UserId
  email : EmailAddress
  passwordHash : PasswordHash
  createdAt : Instant
  isActive : Boolean
}

description: Define primitive-derived alias types for an audit logging system: LogId (string), UserId (string), Action (enum of CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, LOGIN, LOGOUT), and Timestamp (instant).
taxi:
type LogId inherits String
type UserId inherits String
enum Action { CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, LOGIN, LOGOUT }
type Timestamp inherits Instant

description: Create an EnergyMeterService with an operation getMeterById that takes a MeterId string and returns a String, and another operation listMetersByZone that takes a ZoneName string and returns an array of MeterIds.
Define a Content model with id, title, and views; then query all content and project only the title and view count as a report.
Create an AuthService with operations login (taking a username and password, returning a String token) and logout (taking a token string).

Define a Shipment model with an id (ShipmentId, a string-derived type), origin and destination addresses (both Address strings), current status (ShipmentStatus enum), estimated delivery date, and a list of package IDs.
taxi:
type ShipmentId inherits String
type Address inherits String
enum ShipmentStatus { PENDING, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED, CANCELLED }
type PackageId inherits String
model Shipment {
  id : ShipmentId
  origin : Address
  destination : Address
  status : ShipmentStatus
  estimatedDeliveryDate : Date
  packageIds : PackageId[]
}

description: Define a User model with an id (UserId, a string-derived type), email, and a nested Profile model containing the user's full name and avatar URL.
Define a PaymentStatus enum (PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED) and a Payment model with an id (PaymentId, a string-derived type), amount (Decimal), and status.
Define an EnergyReportStatus enum (DRAFT, SUBMITTED, APPROVED) and a DailyEnergyReport model with an id, date, status, and totalConsumptionKWh.
Define a subdomain for tracking inventory levels across multiple energy product types, including categories (e.g., FUEL, ELECTRICITY), units of measure, and stock levels per location.
Define a Property model with an id, address, and price; then query for all properties and project only their ids and addresses.
Define a Transaction model with id, amount (Decimal), and status; then query all transactions and project only their ids and amounts.
Create an InventoryService with operations to get the current stock level for a product (by ProductId) and to update it by a given quantity.
Define a real estate search subdomain with property types, locations, and a search service that filters properties by price range, location, and type.

Define a healthcare billing subdomain with patient insurance info, claim status enum, and a Claim model linking patients to claims; include a BillingService with operations to submit and retrieve claims.
Define primitive-derived alias types for core ecommerce entities: ProductId, CategoryId, and UserId (all strings), plus a Price type as a decimal.
taxi:
type ProductId inherits String
type CategoryId inherits String
type UserId inherits String
type Price inherits Decimal

description: Define a Ride model for a rideshare service with fields: rideId (a string-derived ID), passengerId, driverId (both string IDs), pickupLocation and dropoffLocation (strings), fare (a decimal), and status (an enum).
taxi:
type RideId inherits String
type PassengerId inherits String
type DriverId inherits String
enum RideStatus { PENDING, ACCEPTED, IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED, CANCELLED }
model Ride {
  rideId : RideId
  passengerId : PassengerId
  driverId : DriverId?
  pickupLocation : String
  dropoffLocation : String
  fare : Decimal
  status : RideStatus
}

description: Create a BillingService with CRUD operations for Payment records: createPayment, getPaymentById, updatePayment, and deletePayment.
Define primitive-derived alias types for a trading domain: TradeId, Symbol (stock ticker), Quantity (integer shares), and Price (decimal value).
taxi:
type TradeId inherits String
type Symbol inherits String
type Quantity inherits Int
type Price inherits Decimal

description: Define primitive-derived alias types for audit logging: UserId (string), Action (string), and Timestamp (instant).
taxi:
type UserId inherits String
type Action inherits String
type Timestamp inherits Instant

description: Define a BankAccount model with an accountNumber (String), ownerName (String), balance (Decimal), status (AccountStatus enum), openedAt (Instant), and branchCode (String).
taxi:
type AccountNumber inherits String
type OwnerName inherits String
type BranchCode inherits String
enum AccountStatus { ACTIVE, FROZEN, CLOSED }
model BankAccount {
  accountNumber : AccountNumber
  ownerName : OwnerName
  balance : Decimal
  status : AccountStatus
  openedAt : Instant
  branchCode : BranchCode
}

description: Define an EnrollmentStatus enum (APPLIED, ACCEPTED, ENROLLED, GRADUATED) and a Student model with an id (StudentId, a string-derived type) and a status.
Define a StockStatus enum (IN_STOCK, LOW_STOCK, OUT_OF_STOCK) and an InventoryItem model with an id, name, and current status.

taxi:
type DriverId inherits String
type PassengerId inherits String
type RideId inherits String
type Rating inherits Decimal

description: Create an ExternalLabService with an operation submitTestRequest that takes a PatientId and a TestType string, returning a LabRequestId string.
Define an AuditLog model with a timestamp, action, and a reference to a User who performed the action; define User as a separate model with an id and name.
Create a NotificationService with an operation sendNotification that takes a recipient (String) and a message (String), returning a Boolean indicating success.

Define UserId, Username, and EmailAddress as string-derived types. Create User, NewUser, and UpdatedUser models where UpdatedUser has optional username and email fields. Provide a UserService with operations to create, get, update, and delete users.
Define primitive-derived alias types for telecom notification identifiers, channel names, and status values.
taxi:
type NotificationId inherits String
type ChannelName inherits String
type NotificationStatus inherits String

description: Define a subdomain for tracking the lifecycle state of energy assets, including an AssetType enum (SOLAR, WIND, HYDRO), a LifecycleState enum (PLANNED, CONSTRUCTING, OPERATIONAL, DECOMMISSIONED), and an Asset model with id, type, location, and current lifecycle state.
Create a TransactionService with an operation searchTransactions that takes a customerId (String) and returns a list of Transaction records, each with an id, amount, and timestamp.
Define an AuditLog model with fields for id, action (a string), and timestamp; then query all audit logs and project only the action and timestamp fields.
Define a Course model with an id (CourseId, a string-derived type), a title, and a credits count. Then query for all courses with their titles and credits.
Define a healthcare user authentication subdomain with User (with roles), Session, and AuthService for login/logout.
Define a UserAuthStatus enum (ACTIVE, LOCKED, EXPIRED) and a UserSession model with an id (SessionId, derived from String), userId, and status.
Define primitive-derived alias types for a banking notification system: NotificationId (string), RecipientEmail (string), and NotificationType (enum of EMAIL, SMS, PUSH).

Define a PaymentProvider model for external payment integrations, including provider name (String), API endpoint URL (Url), authentication key (ApiKey), timeout in seconds (Int), and a list of supported currencies (CurrencyCode).
taxi:
type ProviderName inherits String
type Url inherits String
type ApiKey inherits String
type CurrencyCode inherits String
model PaymentProvider {
  name : ProviderName
  endpoint : Url
  apiKey : ApiKey
  timeoutSeconds : Int
  supportedCurrencies : CurrencyCode[]
}

description: Define a User model with an id, email, and role; then query all users and project only their id and email.
Define a User model with an id, email, and a nested Profile containing firstName and lastName; Profile is a separate model referenced by User.
Define a ShipmentStatus enum (PENDING, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED, CANCELLED) and a Shipment model with an id (ShipmentId), status, and estimated delivery timestamp.
Define an AuditLog model for IoT device events with fields: logId (a string-based identifier), deviceId, timestamp, eventLevel (INFO/WARN/ERROR), actorId, and description.
taxi:
type LogId inherits String
type DeviceId inherits String
type ActorId inherits String
enum EventLevel { INFO, WARN, ERROR }
model AuditLog {
  logId : LogId
  deviceId : DeviceId
  timestamp : Instant
  eventLevel : EventLevel
  actorId : ActorId?
  description : String
}

description: Define an AuditLog model with fields for id, userId, action, and timestamp; then query all audit logs and project them to return only the userId and action fields.
Create an AuditLogService with CRUD operations for audit logs: createAuditLog (takes a LogEntry and returns the created entry), getAuditLog (by Id), updateAuditLog, and deleteAuditLog.
Define primitive-derived alias types for a notification system: NotificationId (string), RecipientEmail (string), and Priority (integer).
taxi:
type NotificationId inherits String
type RecipientEmail inherits String
type Priority inherits Int

description: Create an AuthService with operations login (taking a username and password, returning a String token) and logout (taking a token string).
Define a StockLevel annotation with a threshold field (Int) and apply it to a Device model that has an id and currentStock.
Define a Shipment model with an id and status, where status is a LifecycleState enum (CREATED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED), and include a nested ShipmentDetails model that holds tracking information.

Define core agricultural entities for a multi-block farm management system: a Farm model with name and location, a Block model linked to a Farm, a CropType enum for common crops, and a Planting record that ties a Block to a CropType with a planting date.

Define a notification subdomain for an education system: include types for NotificationId and UserId, an enum for NotificationType (ANNOUNCEMENT, ASSIGNMENT_DUE, GRADE_UPDATED), a model for Notification with fields id, userId, type, message, and timestamp, and a service to send notifications.
Define a Game model with an id and title, and a Review model that references a Game via gameId and includes a rating (1-5) and optional comment.

Create a BillingService with CRUD operations for invoices: createInvoice, getInvoice, updateInvoice, and deleteInvoice. Invoices have an id (String), amount (Decimal), status (PAID, UNPAID, OVERDUE), and dueDate.
Define a User model with an id, email, and role (ADMIN or USER), then query for all users with the ADMIN role.
Define a PaymentStatus enum (PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED) and an Invoice model with an id (InvoiceId, a string-derived type), amount, and status.
Define a UserAuthStatus enum (ACTIVE, LOCKED, EXPIRED) and a UserSession model with an id (SessionId, derived from String), userId, and status.

Define a telecom billing subdomain with a CustomerId type, an InvoiceStatus enum (DRAFT, ISSUED, PAID), an Invoice model with id, customer reference, amount due, and status, and a BillingService with an operation to retrieve an invoice by its id.
Define a NotificationType enum (EMAIL, SMS, PUSH) and a Notification model with an id (NotificationId), type, message, and timestamp.
Define a Notification model with id, message, and timestamp fields, then query all notifications and project only the id and message.
Define a NotificationType enum (ALERT, WARNING, INFO) and a Notification model with an id (String), type, and message.

Create an AuditLogService with an operation logEvent that takes a timestamp (Instant) and a message (String), and returns nothing, plus an operation getRecentEvents that takes a limit (Int) and returns a list of log messages.

taxi:
type ItemId inherits String
type Quantity inherits Int
model StockItem {
  itemId : ItemId
  name : String
  quantityInStock : Quantity
  reorderThreshold : Quantity
  lastUpdated : Instant
}

description: Define a Property model with an id and address, and a Bill model that references a property (via PropertyId) and includes an amount due and due date.
Create a UsageReportService with an operation generateDailyReport that takes a date and returns a summary of total data, minutes, and SMS used by all customers.
Define an AuditAction enum (CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE) and an AuditLog model with fields for action (AuditAction), timestamp (Instant), and description (String).
Create a VehicleInventoryService with an operation getAvailableVehicles that returns a list of vehicle IDs, and another operation updateStockLevel that takes a vehicle ID and a new stock count.
Define a User model with id, email, and passwordHash fields, then query for users by email and project only their id and email.
Define primitive-derived alias types for billing: InvoiceId, Amount (Decimal), CurrencyCode (String), and PaymentStatus (String-derived enum).
taxi:
type InvoiceId inherits String
type Amount inherits Decimal
type CurrencyCode inherits String
enum PaymentStatus { PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED, REFUNDED }

description: Define a reporting subdomain for content analytics, including view counts (aggregated per day), content types, and a daily report model that ties them together.
Define a TradeStatus enum (PENDING, EXECUTED, CANCELLED) and a TradeReport model with an id, status, and timestamp.
Define a reporting subdomain for HR with employee counts by department, average salary calculations, and a summary report model.

Define a social commerce subdomain for inventory management: create types for ProductId and StockLevel, an enum for StockStatus, a model for Product with stock info, and a service to check stock levels.

Define a DeviceIntegration model for an IoT system with fields for device_id (DeviceId, a string-derived type), integration_type (IntegrationType enum), endpoint_url (URL), last_sync (Instant?), and metadata (JSON string).
taxi:
type DeviceId inherits String
type URL inherits String
enum IntegrationType { MQTT, COAP, HTTP, LORAWAN }

model DeviceIntegration {
  device_id : DeviceId
  integration_type : IntegrationType
  endpoint_url : URL
  last_sync : Instant?
  metadata : Metadata
}

description: Create an AuthService with CRUD operations for User records: create a user from a NewUser record, read a user by UserId, update a user with partial updates, and delete a user by UserId.
Define an annotation `@LowStock` that records a threshold value, and apply it to a Vehicle model's stockLevel field to indicate when inventory is below the threshold.
Define a User model with an id (UserId, a string-derived type), email (EmailAddress), passwordHash (PasswordHash), and an optional address field of type Address.
taxi:
type UserId inherits String
type EmailAddress inherits String
type PasswordHash inherits String
model Address {
  street : String
  city : String
  zipCode : String
}
model User {
  id : UserId
  email : EmailAddress
  passwordHash : PasswordHash
  address : Address?
}

description: Define a trading reporting subdomain with Trade, TradeType enum, and AggregatedTradeReport model; include a ReportingService to fetch daily trade summaries grouped by type.
Define a Notification model with an id, message, and timestamp, and a UserNotification model that links a user (via UserId) to a specific notification.

description: Define a PaymentStatus enum (PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED) and a Payment model with an id (PaymentId, a string-derived type), amount (Decimal), and status.

Define a TravelProvider enum (AIRLINE, HOTEL, RENTAL_CAR) and a Booking model with an id, provider, and confirmationNumber.

taxi:

type UserId inherits String

enum Severity { INFO, WARNING, ERROR }

Define a PaymentStatus enum (PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED) and an Invoice model with an id (InvoiceId, a string-derived type), amount, and status.
Define an AuditLog model with fields for id, action (an enum), timestamp, and optional metadata; then query all audit logs and project them to show only the action and timestamp.
Create a CropService with CRUD operations: createCrop, getCropById, updateCrop, and deleteCrop, using a Crop model with id, name, and plantedDate fields.

Create a ContentReportService with an operation getTotalViews that takes no arguments and returns an Int, and another operation getTopContentByViews that takes a limit (Int) and returns an array of ContentViewReport records.

description: Define a user authentication subdomain for an education system, including roles (Student, Teacher, Admin), a User model with email and role, and an AuthService with login and logout operations.
Define a UserStatus enum (ACTIVE, SUSPENDED, PENDING) and a User model with an id (UserId, a string-derived type), email, and status.

Define a Hotel model with an id and name, and a Booking model that references a Hotel via hotelId and includes a guestName and checkInDate.

}

model Booking {
  id : BookingId
  hotelId : HotelId
  guestName : GuestName
  checkInDate : CheckInDate
}

description: Define a UserStatus enum (ACTIVE, INACTIVE, SUSPENDED) and a User model with an id (UserId, a string-derived type), email, and status.

Create a RealEstateReportService with an operation getAveragePriceByCity that takes a city name and returns the average price as a Decimal, and another operation countListingsByStatus that takes a status enum and returns the count as an Int.
Create an InventoryService with CRUD operations: createItem, readItem, updateItem, and deleteItem for StockItems. A StockItem has an id (ItemId), a name, and a quantity (non-negative integer).

Define a CustomerId type and an ExternalCustomer model with name, phone, and status fields. Create an ExternalCustomerService with CRUD operations: createCustomer (returns CustomerId), getCustomer (by id, returns ExternalCustomer), updateCustomer (id and updated data, returns Boolean), deleteCustomer (by id, returns Boolean).

Create a BillingService with CRUD operations for invoices: createInvoice, getInvoiceById, updateInvoice, and deleteInvoice. Invoices have an id (String), patientId (String), amount (Decimal), and status (InvoiceStatus enum: DRAFT, ISSUED, PAID, CANCELLED).

description: Define a User model for authentication with fields: userId (UserId, derived from String), email, hashedPassword, createdAt (Instant), isActive (Boolean), and role (UserRoles enum).

  email : EmailAddress
  hashedPassword : HashedPassword
  createdAt : Instant
  isActive : Boolean
  role : UserRoles
}

description: Define an audit logging subdomain for content operations, including event types (CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE), a ContentId type, an AuditEvent model with timestamp and actor info, and a service to log events.
Define a Product model with an id, name, and a StockLevel model that contains quantity and warehouseLocation.
Define a Notification model with an id, device_id, message, and timestamp; then query for all notifications from a specific device.
Define an OrderStatus enum (PENDING, PAID, SHIPPED, CANCELLED) and a DailyOrderReport model that includes the date, total orders count, and status breakdown (a map from OrderStatus to Int).

Define a Destination model with an id, name, and country; then define a TravelSearchFilter model that includes optional filters for destination (referencing Destination), minimum price, and maximum duration in days.
Define a Crop model with an id (CropId, a string-derived type), name, planting date, harvest date, current lifecycle state (an enum), and a flag indicating if it's organic.
Define a DeviceId type from String, an enum for network technologies (4G, 5G, LTE), and a Device model with id and networkTechnology fields.
Define an AuditLog model with fields for id, action (a string), timestamp, and userId; then query all audit logs and project them to return only the action and timestamp.

Define a Shipment model with an id (ShipmentId, a string-derived type), origin location, destination location, current lifecycle state (State enum: CREATED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED), estimated delivery date, and a list of package IDs.
taxi:
type ShipmentId inherits String

enum State { CREATED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED }
model Shipment {
  id : ShipmentId
  origin : Location
  destination : Location
  currentState : State
  estimatedDeliveryDate : Date
  packageIds : ShipmentId[]
}

description: Create a RideAnalyticsService with an operation totalRidesByDate that takes a Date and returns the number of rides as an Int, and another operation averageRideDuration that takes no arguments and returns a Decimal.
Define a User model with an id and name, and a Post model that references the User who authored it via an authorId field.
Define a Transaction model with id, amount (Decimal), and status; then query all transactions and project only their ids and amounts.
Define a PaymentProvider enum (Stripe, PayPal, Adyen) and a Payment model with an id (PaymentId, a string-derived type) and a provider.
Define a SensorReading model with id, sensorId, value, and timestamp; then query for all readings from a specific sensor, projecting only the value and timestamp.
Define a Trade model with an id, symbol, and quantity; and a TradeNotification model that references a TradeId (a string-derived type) and includes a message.

Define a ShipmentId type, CarrierCode and ShipmentStatus enums, Shipment and ShipmentRequest models, and a SupplyChainIntegration service with operations for getting shipment status and submitting shipments; also define a CallbackEndpoint annotation.
Define a Notification model with id, type (enum: SMS, EMAIL, PUSH), and message; then query for all notifications of type SMS.

Define a Device model with an id (DeviceId, a string-derived type), name, and firmwareVersion; then create a DeviceService with CRUD operations: createDevice (takes a Device without id), getDeviceById, updateDevice, and deleteDevice.

Define core trading entities: a TradeType enum (BUY, SELL), an Asset model with symbol and type, a Trader model with id and name, and a Trade model linking trader, asset, quantity, type, and timestamp.
Define an EnergyAsset model with fields for id (AssetId), name, type (AssetType), currentLifecycleState (LifecycleState), installationDate, and decommissionDate (optional).
Define a TransactionStatus enum (PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED) and a TransactionReport model with an id, status, and timestamp.

Define an AuditLog model with fields for timestamp, user_id (a string), action (an enum of CREATE, READ, UPDATE, DELETE), and optional details. Then create an AuditLogService with CRUD operations: createAuditLog (takes no arguments and returns the created log), getAuditLog (takes an AuditLogId string and returns the log), updateAuditLog (takes an AuditLogId and new details, returns updated log), and deleteAuditLog (takes an AuditLogId and returns void).
Define a CourseId type and an ExternalCourseService with operations to create, get, update, and delete courses. Each operation should return a meaningful response instead of Unit.
Define an Item model with id, name, and quantity fields. Then query all items and project only their names and quantities.
Create a MediaService with operations to publish and unpublish a media item, each taking an ItemId (a string-derived type) and returning void.
Create an AuthService with operations login (takes username and password, returns a String token) and logout (takes a token string).
Define a User model with an id and email, then query for users and project only their emails.
Create an InventoryService with CRUD operations: createItem, getItem, updateItem, and deleteItem for game item inventory management. ItemId is a string-derived type.

Define a Notification model for a fintech app with fields: id (NotificationId, string-derived), userId (UserId, string-derived), message (String), sentAt (Instant), isRead (Boolean), and priority (NotificationPriority, an enum).

type UserId inherits String
enum NotificationPriority { LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH }
model Notification {
  id : NotificationId
  userId : UserId
  message : String
  sentAt : Instant
  isRead : Boolean
  priority : NotificationPriority
}

description: Define a UserService with CRUD operations for User records: createUser, getUserById, updateUser, and deleteUser. Users have an id (UserId), email (EmailAddress), and a boolean isActive flag.

Define an audit logging subdomain for an e-commerce system, including types for user identifiers and action codes, an enum for log severity levels, a model for audit events, and a service to record them.
Define a Property model with id, address, price, and status fields; then write a find query to search properties by city and project only the id and address.
Define primitive-derived alias types for a rideshare domain: DriverId, PassengerId, RideId (all strings), and Rating (a decimal between 0 and 5).
taxi:

description: Define a Transaction model with an id, amount, and lifecycleState (enum: CREATED, PROCESSED, COMPLETED), then query for all transactions projected to show only their id and lifecycleState.

taxi:

description: Define a Payment model for an IoT billing system with fields: paymentId (a string), amount (a decimal), currency (a 3-letter code), status (an enum: PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED), timestamp (a date-time), and deviceId (a string).

description: Define a Payment system with types for IDs and amounts, a Currency enum, and models for new, updated, and existing payments. Include a PaymentService with create, get, update, and delete operations.
Define a User model with an id, username, and email; then query all users and project only their usernames and emails.
Define a CallDetailRecord model with fields for callId, callerId, calleeId, durationSeconds, and timestamp; and a CallSummary model that aggregates call data with totalCalls and totalDurationMinutes.
taxi:

type CallerId inherits String

  periodEnd : Date

  totalDurationMinutes : Decimal
}

description: Define a BankAccount model with an accountNumber (String), ownerName (String), and balance (Decimal). Then create a BankAccountService with CRUD operations: createAccount, getAccount, updateAccount, and deleteAccount.

Define a media search subdomain with support for filtering by type, genre, and release year. Include enums for MediaType and Genre, a MediaItem model with optional fields, and a SearchService with an operation to find media items matching criteria.
Define primitive-derived alias types for an audit logging system in a gaming context: LogId (string), UserId (string), GameId (string), Action (string), and Timestamp (instant).
taxi:
type LogId inherits String
type UserId inherits String
type GameId inherits String
type Action inherits String
type Timestamp inherits Instant

description: Define a reporting subdomain for media content with views, plays, and engagement metrics. Include an EngagementType enum (VIEW, PLAY, LIKE), a ContentId type, a MediaContent model with title and duration, and an AggregatedMetrics model that groups metrics by content and date. Also define a ReportingService with an operation to fetch aggregated metrics for a given ContentId.

Define a Product model for supply chain tracking with fields: productId (a string-based ID), name, category (a Category enum), quantityInStock (an integer), unitPrice (a decimal), and isActive (a boolean).
taxi:
type ProductId inherits String
type Name inherits String
type Category inherits String
model Product {
  productId : ProductId
  name : Name
  category : Category
  quantityInStock : Int
  unitPrice : Decimal
  isActive : Boolean
}

description: Define a real estate search subdomain with property types, locations, and a search operation that filters properties by price range, location, and type.

Define an AuditLog model for travel-related actions, including fields for a unique log ID (LogId), user identifier (UserId), action performed (ActionName), timestamp (LoggedAt), resource affected (ResourceType), and optional metadata (Metadata).
taxi:
type LogId inherits String
type UserId inherits String
type ActionName inherits String
type ResourceType inherits String
model AuditLog {
  id : LogId
  userId : UserId
  action : ActionName
  loggedAt : Instant
  resourceType : ResourceType
  metadata : String?
}

description: Define a PaymentStatus enum (PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED) and a Transaction model with an id (TransactionId, derived from String), amount (Decimal), and status.
Define a 'LiquidityAnnotation' to mark models representing liquid assets, and apply it to a 'Security' model with an id and symbol.
Define an AuditLog model for trading activities with fields: logId (a string-based identifier), timestamp, userId, action (a predefined trading action type), assetSymbol, and quantity.
taxi:
type LogId inherits String
type UserId inherits String
enum TradingAction { BUY, SELL, CANCEL, MODIFY }
model AuditLog {
  logId : LogId
  timestamp : Instant
  userId : UserId
  action : TradingAction
  assetSymbol : String
  quantity : Decimal?
}

description: Define a Payment model for logistics billing with fields: paymentId (a string), amount (a decimal), currency (a 3-letter code), status (an enum: PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED), invoiceId (a string), and paidAt (an optional timestamp).
taxi:
type PaymentId inherits String
type InvoiceId inherits String
type CurrencyCode inherits String
enum PaymentStatus { PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED }
model Payment {
  paymentId : PaymentId
  amount : Decimal
  currency : CurrencyCode
  status : PaymentStatus
  invoiceId : InvoiceId
  paidAt : Instant?
}

taxi:

type DeviceId inherits String

taxi:
type UserId inherits String
type EmailAddress inherits String
type HashedPassword inherits String
model User {

description: Define primitive-derived alias types for a content management system: ContentId (string), Slug (lowercase string), Version (decimal), and Published (boolean).

taxi:

description: Define a CropReport model for agricultural reporting with fields for reportId (a string), farmName, cropType, yieldInTons (a decimal), plantingDate, and a flag indicating if the report is finalized.
taxi:

type FarmName inherits String

  reportId : ReportId
  farmName : FarmName

  yieldInTons : YieldInTons

  isFinalized : Boolean
}

description: Define types for NotificationId, Title, and Message; models for NewNotification (with required fields), UpdatedNotification (with nullable fields), and Notification (with id, title, and message); and a NotificationService with create, get, update, and delete operations.
Define a Candidate model with an id, name, and email; then query for all candidates with the TaxiQL find syntax.
Define an AuditLog model that includes a timestamp, action description, and a reference to a Device (via DeviceId), where Device is another model with an id and name.
Define a Report model that includes a reference to a Student, along with fields for title and score; and define a Student model with an id and name.
Define an annotation ExternalTransactionId to mark fields that store transaction IDs from external payment systems, and apply it to the transactionId field of a Transaction model.

Define a notification subdomain with types for NotificationId and UserId, an enum for NotificationType (EMAIL, PUSH, SMS), a model for Notification containing id, user_id, type, content, and timestamp, and a service to retrieve notifications by user.
Create a SubscriberService with an operation getSubscriberById that takes a SubscriberId string and returns a String, and another operation listSubscribers that returns an array of Strings.

Define a notification system for agricultural alerts: create types for FarmId and AlertLevel, an enum for NotificationType (IRRIGATION, PEST, FROST), a model for FarmAlert with fields id, farmId, type, message, and timestamp, and a service to send and retrieve alerts.

taxi:

Define a User model with an id (UserId, a string-derived type), email, and passwordHash; then write a TaxiQL query to find all users with a given email.

Define a User model with id and email, plus NewUser (for creation) and UpdateUser models. The UpdateUser should allow optional email updates. Include a UserService with create, read, update, and delete operations.
Define primitive-derived alias types for user authentication: UserId, SessionToken, and PasswordHash.
taxi:
type UserId inherits String
type SessionToken inherits String
type PasswordHash inherits String

description: Define a billing subdomain with PaymentMethod enum (CREDIT_CARD, BANK_TRANSFER, PAYPAL), a Money type (Decimal with currency annotation), an Invoice model (id, customer_id, amount, status), and a PaymentService with operations to create an invoice and process a payment.
Define a ContentItem model with id, title, and tags; then query for all content items and project only the title and a list of tag strings.
Define an AuditLog model with fields for id, action (a string), timestamp, and userId; then query all audit logs and project only the id and action fields.
Define a Flight model with airline code, flight number, and departure time; then query for all flights and project only the airline code and flight number.
Define a PropertyStatus enum (AVAILABLE, SOLD, UNDER_CONTRACT) and a Property model with an id and a status.
Define core telecom entities: a Plan model with a name and price, a Customer model with an id, name, and active plan reference, and a Device model linked to a customer with a unique IMEI.
Define a Notification model with id, recipientId (string), and message; then query for all notifications and project only the id and message fields.
Define a ReportStatus enum (DRAFT, SUBMITTED, APPROVED, REJECTED) and a ClinicalReport model with an id (ReportId), a status, and a timestamp for when it was created.
Define a User model with id, email, and role; then query all users and project only their email and role.
Create a GameIntegrationService with CRUD operations for external game data: createGame, getGameById (using GameId), updateGame, and deleteGame.

Define a gaming inventory subdomain with item types, stock levels, and a service to update them: ItemId (string), ItemType enum (WEAPON, ARMOR, CONSUMABLE), Item model with name and type, StockLevel model tracking quantity and last updated timestamp, and an InventoryService with an operation to update stock.
Define a StockStatus enum (IN_STOCK, LOW_STOCK, OUT_OF_STOCK) and an InventoryItem model with an id, name, and current status.
Define a User model with an id, email, and password hash, and an AuthToken model that references the User via userId.

Define CourseId as a string-derived type, and create Subject and Level enums (not types) with values MATH/SCIENCE/HISTORY/LITERATURE and BEGINNER/INTERMEDIATE/ADVANCED respectively. Then define a Course model with id, title, subject, level, and optional description. Finally, create a CourseSearchService with a searchCourses operation that accepts optional subject, level, and searchTerm parameters and returns an array of Course.
Define a ProductStatus enum (AVAILABLE, OUT_OF_STOCK, DISCONTINUED) and a Product model with an id (ProductId, a string-derived type), name, and status.
Define an AuditLog model with fields for id, action (CREATE, READ, UPDATE, DELETE), timestamp, user, and optional metadata; then create an AuditLogService with CRUD operations for audit logs.
taxi:
type AuditLogId inherits String
enum AuditAction { CREATE, READ, UPDATE, DELETE }
type UserId inherits String
type Metadata inherits String
model AuditLog {
  id : AuditLogId
  action : AuditAction
  timestamp : Instant
  user : UserId
  metadata : Metadata?
}
service AuditLogService {
  operation create(log : AuditLog) : AuditLog
  operation read(id : AuditLogId) : AuditLog
  operation update(id : AuditLogId, log : AuditLog) : AuditLog
  operation delete(id : AuditLogId) : Void
}

description: Define an AuditLog model with fields for id (a string), action (an enum of CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE), timestamp, and actorEmail; then write a TaxiQL query to find all audit logs for a specific action.
Create a ProductSearchService with operations to search products by name (case-insensitive), filter by category, and retrieve a product by its ID.
Define a User model with id and email, plus NewUser (for creation) and UpdateUser (for partial updates). Create a UserService with create, read, update, and delete operations.

Define types for a gaming system: PlayerId, GameSessionId, InventoryItemId as strings; Rarity enum with COMMON, RARE, EPIC, LEGENDARY values; GameId and Timestamp (as Instant); Player model with id and name; GameSession model with id, player reference, game reference, start time, and optional end time; InventoryItem model with id, player reference, game reference, quantity, and rarity.
taxi:
type PlayerId inherits String
type GameSessionId inherits String
type InventoryItemId inherits String
enum Rarity { COMMON, RARE, EPIC, LEGENDARY }
type GameId inherits String
type Timestamp inherits Instant
model Player {
  id : PlayerId
  name : String
}
model GameSession {
  id : GameSessionId
  player : PlayerId
  game : GameId
  startTime : Timestamp
  endTime : Timestamp?
}
model InventoryItem {
  id : InventoryItemId
  playerId : PlayerId
  gameId : GameId
  quantity : Int
  rarity : Rarity
}

Create a ReportingService with an operation getStudentGrades that takes a StudentId and returns a list of Grade records, and another operation calculateAverageGrade that takes a CourseId and returns the average grade as a Decimal.

Define a RideRequest model with an id, passenger name, pickup location, dropoff location, and status; then create a RideRequestService with CRUD operations: createRideRequest, getRideRequest, updateRideRequest, and deleteRideRequest.

  pickupLocation : Location

}
service RideRequestService {
  operation createRideRequest(request : RideRequest) : RideRequestId

}

}

Define a Payment model for a billing system with fields: paymentId (a string), amount (a decimal), currency (a 3-letter code), status (an enum: PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED), createdAt (a timestamp), and description (optional text).
taxi:
type PaymentId inherits String
type CurrencyCode inherits String
enum PaymentStatus { PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED }
model Payment {
  paymentId : PaymentId
  amount : Decimal
  currency : CurrencyCode
  status : PaymentStatus
  createdAt : Instant
  description : String?
}

description: Define primitive-derived alias types for a gaming domain: PlayerId, GameId, Score (integer), and Level (integer).
taxi:
type PlayerId inherits String
type GameId inherits String
type Score inherits Int
type Level inherits Int

description: Define a CropType enum (WHEAT, CORN, SOYBEAN) and an ExternalFarmIntegration model that includes a farmId (String), a cropType, and an optional lastSync timestamp.
Define a Product model with an id, name, and a StockLevel record containing quantity and warehouse location.

Create an EnergyMeterService with CRUD operations: createMeter, readMeterById, updateMeter, and deleteMeterById. Meters have an id (MeterId), a name, a reading (Decimal), and a timestamp of last update.
Define a Trade model with an id, symbol, and quantity; and a TradeNotification model that references a TradeId (a string-derived type) along with a message and timestamp.

Define an AuditLog model for tracking educational system changes, with fields for log ID (String), timestamp (Instant), user ID (UserId), action performed (ActionType enum), target entity type (String), and optional metadata (String).
taxi:
type LogId inherits String
type UserId inherits String
enum ActionType { CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, LOGIN, LOGOUT }
model AuditLog {
  id : LogId
  timestamp : Instant
  userId : UserId
  action : ActionType
  targetType : String
  metadata : String?
}

description: Define an audit logging subdomain for trading, including types for TradeId and UserId (both strings), an AuditAction enum (BUY, SELL, CANCEL), a TradeAudit model capturing trade actions with timestamps and metadata, and an AuditLogService with an operation to record a new audit entry.
Define a User model with an id, email, and passwordHash; and an AuthSession model that references a User via userId and includes a token and expiry timestamp.
taxi:
type UserId inherits String
type EmailAddress inherits String
type PasswordHash inherits String
type Token inherits String
model User {
  id : UserId
  email : EmailAddress
  passwordHash : PasswordHash
}
model AuthSession {
  userId : UserId
  token : Token
  expiry : Instant
}

description: Create an AuditLogService with an operation logEvent that takes a string event name and a timestamp, and returns void.
Define a ContentItem model with id, title, and published status; then query for all content items and project only their titles and IDs.
Create a StockService with an operation getStockLevel that takes a ProductId string and returns the current stock level as an integer.

Define a Subscription model for telecom with fields: subscriptionId (a string), customerId (a string), planName (a string), activationDate (a date), expiryDate (a date?), and lifecycleState (a LifecycleState enum).

  activationDate : Date
  expiryDate : Date?
  lifecycleState : LifecycleState
}

description: Define a fintech subdomain for searching and filtering transactions: include TransactionId (string), TransactionStatus enum (PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED), a Transaction model with id, amount (decimal), status, and timestamp; then define a TransactionsService with an operation searchTransactions that accepts optional filters for status and date range, returning a list of transactions.

Define a Notification model with an id, recipient email, and message; then query for all notifications sent to a specific email address.

}
