Create a CourseService with CRUD operations: createCourse, getCourseById, updateCourse, and deleteCourse, using a Course model with id (CourseId), title, and instructor.
Define a PostStatus enum (DRAFT, PUBLISHED, ARCHIVED) and a Post model with an id (PostId), title, content, and status.
Define an AuditEventStatus enum (PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED) and an AuditLog model with an id (AuditId), a description, and a status.
Define an AuditAction enum (CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE) and an AuditLog model with fields for action (AuditAction), timestamp (Instant), and user (String).
Define a Transaction model with an id, amount (Decimal), and timestamp; and a DailyReport model that aggregates transactions by date with a totalAmount field.
Define a Notification model with an id, content, and a recipient (User), where User is another model with an id and name.
Define a Property model with an id, address, and monthly rent; define a PaymentStatus enum (PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED); then write a TaxiQL query to find all properties with pending payments.

Define an AuditLog model for travel-related actions, including fields for a unique log ID (LogId), user identifier (UserId), action performed (ActionName), timestamp (LoggedAt), resource affected (ResourceType), and optional metadata (Metadata).
taxi:
type LogId inherits String
type UserId inherits String
type ActionName inherits String
type ResourceType inherits String
model AuditLog {
  id : LogId
  userId : UserId
  action : ActionName
  loggedAt : Instant
  resourceType : ResourceType
  metadata : String?
}

description: Define a Supplier model with id, name, and country; then query all suppliers and project only their names and countries.
Define a Vehicle model for a rideshare fleet, including an id (VehicleId), make, model, year, current mileage, and availability status (a boolean).
taxi:
type VehicleId inherits String
model Vehicle {
  id : VehicleId
  make : String
  model : String
  year : Int
  mileage : Int
  available : Boolean
}

description: Define an AuditLog model with a timestamp, action description, and a reference to a User who performed the action; define a User model with an id and name.
Define a Payment model with id and amount fields, and an annotation RequiresApproval that can be applied to models with a level field.
Define a User model with an id, email, and active status; then query for all active users.
Define a Hotel model for travel search with fields: id (HotelId), name, location (CityName), rating (Decimal), pricePerNight (CurrencyAmount), and availableRooms (Int).
taxi:
type HotelId inherits String
type CityName inherits String
type CurrencyAmount inherits Decimal
model Hotel {
  id : HotelId
  name : String
  location : CityName
  rating : Decimal
  pricePerNight : CurrencyAmount
  availableRooms : Int
}

description: Define a Notification model with an id, message, and recipient (a User), where User has an id and name.
Define a CourseLevel enum (BEGINNER, INTERMEDIATE, ADVANCED) and a Course model with an id, title, and level.
Define a SocialPlatform enum (FACEBOOK, TWITTER, INSTAGRAM) and an ExternalProfile model with a platform field and a handle.
Define a Property model with an id, address, and price; then query for all properties and project only their ids and addresses.
Define a Subscription model with id, plan name, and monthly price; then query all subscriptions to project only the id and plan name.
Define a NotificationStatus enum (PENDING, SENT, FAILED) and a Notification model with an id (NotificationId), a recipient email, and a status.

Define an AuditLog model for tracking energy consumption changes, with fields for a unique log ID (AuditLogId), timestamp of the event, user who made the change, old and new consumption values (in kWh), and a description of the change.
taxi:
type AuditLogId inherits String
type UserId inherits String
type ConsumptionKwh inherits Decimal
model AuditLog {
  id : AuditLogId
  timestamp : Instant
  userId : UserId
  oldConsumptionKwh : ConsumptionKwh?
  newConsumptionKwh : ConsumptionKwh
  description : String
}

description: Define a Supplier model for telecom external integrations, with fields for supplier id (a UUID string), name, contact email, active status, contract start date, and a list of supported technologies.
taxi:
type SupplierId inherits String
type ContactEmail inherits String
model Supplier {
  id : SupplierId
  name : String
  contactEmail : ContactEmail?
  isActive : Boolean
  contractStartDate : Date
  supportedTechnologies : String[]
}

description: Define lifecycle state types for employee records: a Status type (ACTIVE, ON_LEAVE, TERMINATED) and an OnboardingStage type (APPLIED, SCREENED, INTERVIEWING, OFFERED, HIRED).
taxi:
enum Status { ACTIVE, ON_LEAVE, TERMINATED }
enum OnboardingStage { APPLIED, SCREENED, INTERVIEWING, OFFERED, HIRED }

description: Define a MediaType enum (VIDEO, AUDIO, IMAGE) and a MediaAsset model with an id (MediaId, a string-derived type), title, and type.
Define a GameItem model with an id, name, and quantity in stock; and an Inventory model that contains a list of GameItems.
Create a ShipmentService with CRUD operations for Shipments, including search by tracking number and filter by status.
Define a User model with an id, email, and role; then query all users and project only their id and email.
Define primitive-derived alias types for inventory management: StockId (string), Quantity (integer), and ThresholdLevel (integer).
taxi:
type StockId inherits String
type Quantity inherits Int
type ThresholdLevel inherits Int

description: Define a Meter model with an id, type, and reading; then query all meters and project only their ids and types.

Create a BankingService with an operation getAccount that takes an AccountId (a string-derived type) and returns a String, and another operation getBalance that takes an AccountId and returns a Decimal.
Define a Crop model with an id (CropId, a string-derived type), name, plantingDate, expectedHarvestDate, yieldEstimate (in kilograms), and a boolean flag indicating if it's organic.
taxi:
type CropId inherits String
type CropName inherits String
model Crop {
  id : CropId
  name : CropName
  plantingDate : Date
  expectedHarvestDate : Date
  yieldEstimate : Decimal
  isOrganic : Boolean
}

description: Define a Property model with address, price, and status fields; then query all properties and project only their addresses and prices for a report.

Define a Product model with an id (ProductId, a string-derived type), name, and price; then create a ProductService with CRUD operations: createProduct (takes Product without id), getProduct (by id), updateProduct (full product with id), and deleteProduct (by id).
Define primitive-derived alias types for a billing system: EmployeeId, PaymentAmount (decimal), CurrencyCode (string), and PaymentStatus (string).
taxi:
type EmployeeId inherits String
type PaymentAmount inherits Decimal
type CurrencyCode inherits String
type PaymentStatus inherits String

description: Create a ProductSearchService with operations to search products by name (case-insensitive), filter by category, and retrieve a product by its ID.
Define a ContentItem model with id, title, and tags; then query for all content items and project only their titles and tag counts.
Create a NotificationService with an operation sendNotification that takes a recipient (EmailAddress) and a message (String), and returns a Boolean indicating success.
Define primitive-derived alias types for an audit logging system: LogId (string), UserId (string), Action (enum of CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, LOGIN, LOGOUT), and Timestamp (instant).
taxi:
type LogId inherits String
type UserId inherits String
enum Action { CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, LOGIN, LOGOUT }
type Timestamp inherits Instant

description: Define a Patient model with an id (PatientId, a string-derived type), name, and date of birth; then query for all patients.

Define an AuditLog model for tracking financial transactions, including fields for a unique log ID (AuditLogId), timestamp of the event, user who triggered it (UserId), action performed (ActionType), resource affected (ResourceId), and an optional description.
taxi:
type AuditLogId inherits String
type UserId inherits String
type ResourceId inherits String
enum ActionType { CREATED, UPDATED, DELETED, TRANSFERRED, APPROVED, REJECTED }
model AuditLog {
  id : AuditLogId
  timestamp : Instant
  userId : UserId
  action : ActionType
  resourceId : ResourceId
  description : String?
}

description: Define primitive-derived alias types for reporting metrics: ReportId (string), MetricName (string), and Count (integer).
taxi:
type ReportId inherits String
type MetricName inherits String
type Count inherits Int

description: Define a Patient model with an id, name, and lifecycleState (an enum), then query all patients and project only their names and lifecycle states.

Define a RideRequest model with id, passenger name, pickup location, dropoff location, and status; create a RideRequestService with CRUD operations: createRideRequest, getRideRequestById, updateRideRequest, and deleteRideRequest.
taxi:
type RideRequestId inherits String
type PassengerName inherits String
type Location inherits String
enum RideStatus { PENDING, ACCEPTED, IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED, CANCELLED }
model RideRequest {
  id : RideRequestId
  passengerName : PassengerName
  pickupLocation : Location
  dropoffLocation : Location
  status : RideStatus
}
service RideRequestService {
  operation createRideRequest(request : RideRequest) : RideRequestId
  operation getRideRequestById(id : RideRequestId) : RideRequest
  operation updateRideRequest(id : RideRequestId, request : RideRequest) : RideRequest
  operation deleteRideRequest(id : RideRequestId) : Boolean
}

description: Define a Trade model with id, symbol, quantity, and price; then query for all trades and project only the symbol and total value (quantity * price) as a decimal.

Define a subdomain for employee expense billing: create types for EmployeeId and CurrencyCode, an enum for ExpenseStatus, a model for ExpenseReport with fields id, employeeId, currency, and status, and a service to submit expense reports.
Define primitive-derived alias types for an audit logging system in a gaming context: LogId (string), UserId (string), GameId (string), Action (string), and Timestamp (instant).
taxi:
type LogId inherits String
type UserId inherits String
type GameId inherits String
type Action inherits String
type Timestamp inherits Instant

description: Define a StockStatus enum (IN_STOCK, LOW_STOCK, OUT_OF_STOCK) and an InventoryItem model with an id, name, and current status.

Define a notification system with types for NotificationId and UserId, an enum for NotificationType (EMAIL, SMS, PUSH), models for NewNotification, UpdatedNotification, and Notification, and a service with operations to create, get, update, and delete notifications.
Define primitive-derived alias types for real estate notifications: NotificationId (string), RecipientPhone (string), and NotificationType (enum of SMS, EMAIL, PUSH).
Define a Publication model with an id and a lifecycle state (Draft, Review, Published), and a related Author model that references the Publication via a list of published works.
Define an AuthStatus enum (PENDING, VERIFIED, REVOKED) and a UserAuth model with an id (UserId), a status (AuthStatus), and an optional token string.
Define primitive-derived alias types for inventory management: ItemId (string), Quantity (integer), and StockLevel (decimal).
taxi:
type ItemId inherits String
type Quantity inherits Int
type StockLevel inherits Decimal

description: Define a UserStatus enum (ACTIVE, INACTIVE, SUSPENDED) and a User model with an id (UserId, a string-derived type), email, and status.

Define a Transaction model with an id, amount (Decimal), timestamp, and account reference; then create a ReportingService with operations to get total transactions by account (aggregate sum), list recent transactions, and retrieve a single transaction by id.
Define an EmploymentStatus enum (ACTIVE, TERMINATED, ON_LEAVE) and a Report model with an id, title, and status.

Define an AuditLog model for healthcare system events, including fields for a unique log ID (LogId), timestamp of the event (EventTime), user who performed the action (UserId), action type (ActionType, a string), affected patient ID (PatientId), and an optional description field.
taxi:
type LogId inherits String
type UserId inherits String
type PatientId inherits String
model AuditLog {
  id : LogId
  eventTime : Instant
  userId : UserId
  actionType : String
  patientId : PatientId?
  description : String?
}

description: Define an AuditLog model with fields for id, action (a string), timestamp, and user_id; then query all audit logs and project them to return only the action and timestamp fields.
Define primitive-derived alias types for an audit logging system: LogId (string), UserId (string), Action (enum of CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, LOGIN, LOGOUT), and Timestamp (instant).
taxi:
type LogId inherits String
type UserId inherits String
enum Action { CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, LOGIN, LOGOUT }
type Timestamp inherits Instant

description: Define primitive-derived alias types for agricultural inventory: SeedBatchId (string), CropType (string), QuantityInKg (decimal), and StorageLocation (string).
taxi:
type SeedBatchId inherits String
type CropType inherits String
type QuantityInKg inherits Decimal
type StorageLocation inherits String

description: Define a BankAccount model with an account number and owner name, and a Transaction model that references a BankAccount via accountId and includes a description and amount.
Define a GameStatus enum (AVAILABLE, UNAVAILABLE, COMING_SOON) and a Game model with an id (GameId), title, and status.
Create a NotificationService with an operation sendNotification that takes a recipient (UserId) and a message (String), and returns a Boolean indicating success.
Define an ExternalInventoryService with operations to create, read, update, and delete inventory items using an InventoryItemId (string-derived) and returning a String for each operation.
taxi:
type InventoryItemId inherits String
service ExternalInventoryService {
  operation create(itemId : InventoryItemId, data : String) : String
  operation read(itemId : InventoryItemId) : String
  operation update(itemId : InventoryItemId, data : String) : String
  operation delete(itemId : InventoryItemId) : String
}

description: Define a User model with an id, email, and active status; then query for all active users.
Define a Player model with an id (PlayerId, a string-derived type), name, and score; then query for all players with a TaxiQL find block.
Define a SubscriptionState enum (ACTIVE, SUSPENDED, TERMINATED) and a Subscription model with an id (SubscriptionId, a string-derived type) and a state.
Define a User model with an id (UserId, a string-derived type), email, and passwordHash; then query for all users with the find syntax.

Define an Employee model with id (EmployeeId), name, department (using a Department enum), optional years of experience, and active status; also create an EmployeeSearchService with a searchEmployees operation that filters by optional department, minimum years of experience, and active status.
Define an AuditLog model that records an action, timestamp, and the user who performed it (referencing a User model with an id and name).
Define a PaymentStatus enum (PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED) and a Payment model with an id (PaymentId), amount (Decimal), and status.
Define a Broker model with an id and name, and an ExternalOrder model that references a Broker via brokerId.
Define primitive-derived alias types for IoT device lifecycle states: DeviceId (string), FirmwareVersion (string), and LifecycleState (enum of PROVISIONED, ACTIVE, MAINTENANCE, DECOMMISSIONED).

Define a ReportService with CRUD operations for reports: createReport, getReport, updateReport, and deleteReport. Reports have an id (String), title, content (String), and a timestamp for when they were created.
Define a NotificationType enum (INFO, WARNING, ERROR) and a Notification model with an id (String), type (NotificationType), and message (String).
Define an annotation called Authenticated that marks a model as requiring user authentication, and apply it to a User model with an id (UserId, a string-derived type) and a name.

Define a Notification system with types for ID, title, and message; models for new, updated, and full notifications (where title and message are non-nullable in all cases); and a service with create, get, update, and delete operations.
Define lifecycle state alias types for an order: OrderId (string), OrderState (enum of CREATED, PROCESSING, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED), and OrderStatus (enum of ACTIVE, ARCHIVED).

Define a telecom external integration subdomain with a PartnerId type, an IntegrationStatus enum (ACTIVE, INACTIVE, DEPRECATED), a Partner model with id, name, and status, and an IntegrationService with an operation to fetch partners by status.
Define a TradeAuditAction enum (CREATED, UPDATED, CANCELLED) and an AuditLog model with a timestamp, action, and tradeId.
Define an AuditLog model that includes a reference to a User (via UserId) and a timestamped action description.
Define primitive-derived alias types for a notification system: NotificationId (string), UserId (string), and MessageType (enum of SMS, EMAIL, PUSH).
Define a lifecycle state system for IoT devices, including an enum for device states (OFFLINE, ONLINE, MAINTENANCE), a Device model with id and state, and a service to update device states.

Define a logistics subdomain for searching shipments with filters: status (enum), origin/destination cities, and date range. Include a Shipment model with id, status, origin, destination, and scheduled departure.
Define an AuditLog model with fields for id, action (an enum), timestamp, and optional metadata; then query all audit logs and project only the id and action fields.
Define a TradeStatus enum (PENDING, EXECUTED, CANCELLED) and a Trade model with an id, symbol, quantity, and status for search and filtering.
Define an AuditLog model for telecom call records with fields: logId (a string-based identifier), timestamp, callerNumber, calleeNumber, and status (a string).
taxi:
type LogId inherits String
type PhoneNumber inherits String
model AuditLog {
  logId : LogId
  timestamp : Instant
  callerNumber : PhoneNumber
  calleeNumber : PhoneNumber
  status : String
}

description: Define a Notification model with an id, device_id (DeviceId), message, and timestamp; then query for all notifications for a given device.
Define a RideStatus enum (PENDING, ACCEPTED, IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED, CANCELLED) and a Ride model with an id (RideId), pickup location, dropoff location, and status.

Create a PropertyInventoryService with an operation getAvailableProperties that returns a list of property IDs and another operation updateStock that takes a property ID and a quantity to adjust inventory.
Define a Searchable annotation with a relevanceScore field, and an Article model with title and content fields.
Define an annotation `@LowStock` that records a threshold value, and apply it to a Vehicle model's stockLevel field to indicate when inventory is critically low.
Define a Payment model with an id, amount, and timestamp, and a BillingProfile model that references a CustomerId and includes a list of Payment records.
Define a BillingAddress model with street, city, and postalCode fields, and an Invoice model that includes an id, a reference to a BillingAddress, and the total amount due.
Define a GamePlatform enum (STEAM, PLAYSTATION, XBOX) and a Player model with an id (PlayerId, a string-derived type) and a platform.
Define a Hotel model with an id and name, and a Room model that references the hotel it belongs to, including current stock levels.
Define a User model with an id and name, and a Subscription model that references the User via a userId field.
Define a PropertyListing model for external real estate portals, including an externalId (String) from the portal, a list of photos (URLs), and a boolean flag indicating if it's featured.
taxi:
type ExternalId inherits String
type PhotoUrl inherits String
model PropertyListing {
  externalId : ExternalId
  photos : PhotoUrl[]
  isFeatured : Boolean
}

description: Create an AuditLogEntry model with fields for id (String), action (String), timestamp (Instant), and userId (UserId, a String-derived type). Then define an AuditLogService with CRUD operations: createEntry, getEntryById, updateEntry, and deleteEntry.
Define a Post model for a social platform with fields: id (PostId), authorId (UserId), content (Text), createdAt (Instant), visibility (VisibilityLevel), and tags (a list of Tag strings).
taxi:
type PostId inherits String
type UserId inherits String
type Text inherits String
type Tag inherits String
enum VisibilityLevel { PUBLIC, FRIENDS_ONLY, PRIVATE }
model Post {
  id : PostId
  authorId : UserId
  content : Text
  createdAt : Instant
  visibility : VisibilityLevel
  tags : Tag[]
}

description: Define primitive-derived alias types for a gaming domain: PlayerId, GameId, Score (integer), and Level (integer).
taxi:
type PlayerId inherits String
type GameId inherits String
type Score inherits Int
type Level inherits Int

description: Define a RideSearch domain with location types, ride status enum, and a Ride model; then create a RideSearchService with an operation to search rides by location range, status filter, and optional driver ID.

Define an AuditLog model for tracking agricultural operations with fields for log ID (a string), timestamp, user who performed the action, action type (CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE), target entity name, and optional metadata.
taxi:
type LogId inherits String
type UserId inherits String
enum ActionType { CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE }
model AuditLog {
  id : LogId
  timestamp : Instant
  user : UserId
  actionType : ActionType
  targetEntity : String
  metadata : String?
}

description: Define a CourseLevel enum (BEGINNER, INTERMEDIATE, ADVANCED) and a Course model with an id, title, and level.
Define a Notification model with id, title, and read status; then query all notifications and project only their titles and whether they are read.
Define a searchable annotation to mark models that support full-text search, and apply it to a Course model with title and description fields.
Define a MediaItem model with an id, title, and lifecycleState (enum: DRAFT, PUBLISHED, ARCHIVED), then query all published items and project only their id and title.
Define a Device model with id, name, and status fields; then query all devices and project only their names and statuses.
Define a StockStatus enum (IN_STOCK, LOW_STOCK, OUT_OF_STOCK) and an InventoryItem model with a sku (String), name (String), and currentStatus (StockStatus).

Define a reporting subdomain for IoT devices: create types for DeviceId and MetricName, an enum for AggregationType (SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX), a model for MetricReport containing device id, metric name, timestamp, and value, and a service AggregationService with an operation computeAggregation that takes device id, metric name, aggregation type, and a time range (start and end timestamps), returning a list of MetricReport.
Define a ShipmentStatus enum (IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED, DAMAGED) and a ShipmentReport model with an id (ShipmentId), status, and count of items.
Define an AuditAction enum (CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE) and an AuditLog model with fields for action, timestamp, and user.

Create a ContentReportService with an operation getTotalViews that takes no arguments and returns an Int, and another operation getTopContent that takes a limit (Int) and returns an array of ContentSummary.
Define a Post model with an id (PostId, a string-derived type), title, and content; then query for all posts.
Define a Notification model with an id, recipient (email string), and message; then query for all notifications sent to a specific email address.
Define primitive-derived alias types for external gaming platform integrations: SteamId, XboxGamertag, PlayStationOnlineId, and NintendoSwitchFriendCode.
taxi:

type NintendoSwitchFriendCode inherits String

description: Define a User model with id, email, and role; then query all users and project only their email and role.
Define a Supplier model with an id (SupplierId, a string-derived type), name, optional contact email, active status, contract start date, and a list of supported technologies (DSL, FIBER, LTE, 5G).

description: Define an AuditLog model for tracking financial transactions, with fields for a unique log ID (AuditLogId), timestamp of the event, user who triggered it (UserId), action performed (ActionType), affected account (AccountId), and an optional description.
taxi:

type UserId inherits String
type AccountId inherits String
enum ActionType { LOGIN, TRANSFER, WITHDRAWAL, DEPOSIT, PROFILE_UPDATE }
model AuditLog {
  id : AuditLogId
  timestamp : Instant
  userId : UserId
  action : ActionType
  accountId : AccountId?
  description : String?

description: Define a Notification model with id, title, and body fields, then query for all notifications and project only their titles and bodies.
Define a real estate billing subdomain with property identifiers, payment statuses, and a Billing model that links properties to their payment details.
Define primitive-derived alias types for lifecycle states in a supply chain: ShipmentId (string), Status (enum of PENDING, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED, CANCELLED), and Address (string).
Create an AuthService with CRUD operations for User records: createUser, readUser, updateUser, and deleteUser. Users have an id (UserId), a username, and an email.
taxi:

type Username inherits String
type EmailAddress inherits String

description: Define a Notification system with types for ID, title, and message; models for new, updated, and full notifications (where title and message are non-nullable in all cases); and a service with create, get, update, and delete operations.

description: Define a NotificationType enum (EMAIL, SMS, PUSH) and a Notification model with an id (NotificationId, derived from String), a type, and a message.
Define a Property model with id, address, and price; and a SearchCriteria model with optional minPrice, maxPrice, and propertyIds array.

Define a SupplyChain domain with search and filtering capabilities: include Product (with id, name, category), Category enum, Supplier model, and a ProductService with an operation to search products by category and name substring.

description: Define a NotificationType enum (ALERT, REMINDER, UPDATE) and a Notification model with an id (NotificationId, derived from String), a type, and a message.
Define a Transaction model with an id and amount, and a TransactionLifecycle model that tracks the current state (CREATED, PROCESSING, COMPLETED, FAILED) and references a Transaction id.

Define an AuditAction enum with actions (CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, LOGIN, LOGOUT), an ActorId type derived from String, and an AuditLog model with fields for id, actorId, action, timestamp, optional targetId, and optional details. Also define an AuditLogService with operations to log events and find logs by actor within a time range.

Define a CallDetailRecord model with fields for callId (String), callerNumber, calleeNumber, durationSeconds (Int), and timestamp (Instant). Then create a ReportingService with CRUD operations: createCallRecord, getCallRecordById, updateCallRecord, and deleteCallRecord.

Create an InventoryService with CRUD operations: createItem, getItem, updateItem, and deleteItem for game item inventory management. ItemId is a string-derived type.
Define a Product model with an id, name, and stockLevel (an integer), then query for all products projected to show only their id and stock level.
Define a User model with an id (UserId, a string-derived type), email, and passwordHash; then write a TaxiQL query to find all users with a given email.
Define a PaymentStatus enum (PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED) and a RidePayment model with an id, amount, and status.
Define an AuditLog model for tracking content changes, with fields for log id (a string), timestamp, user who made the change, action performed, target content id, and optional metadata.
taxi:

description: Define a RideRequest model with an id, passenger name, pickup location, dropoff location, and status; create a RideRequestService with CRUD operations: createRideRequest (returns RideRequest), getRideRequest (by id), updateRideRequest, and deleteRideRequest.

Define an AuditLog model with fields for id (String), action (String), timestamp (Instant), and userId (UserId, a string-derived type). Then write a TaxiQL query to find all audit logs for a specific user.

Define a Post model with id, authorId (a string), and content; then query for posts by a specific author and project only the id and content.
Define a UserAuthentication model for telecom user login, including userId (UserId alias), hashedPassword, lastLogin (timestamp), isActive status, and a list of assigned roles.
taxi:
type UserId inherits String
type HashedPassword inherits String
model UserAuthentication {
  userId : UserId
  hashedPassword : HashedPassword
  lastLogin : Instant?
  isActive : Boolean
  roles : String[]
}

description: Define core fintech entities: a Customer with personal details, an Account linked to a customer and balance, and a Transaction referencing both a source and destination account.
taxi:
type CustomerId inherits String
type AccountId inherits String
type TransactionId inherits String

type EmailAddress inherits String
type PhoneNumber inherits String

type CurrencyCode inherits String

type Amount inherits Decimal

enum AccountType { CHECKING, SAVINGS, CREDIT_CARD }

model Customer {
  id : CustomerId
  name : String
  email : EmailAddress?
  phone : PhoneNumber?
}

model Account {
  id : AccountId
  customerId : CustomerId
  type : AccountType
  balance : Amount
  currency : CurrencyCode
}

enum TransactionStatus { PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED }

model Transaction {
  id : TransactionId
  sourceAccountId : AccountId
  destinationAccountId : AccountId
  amount : Amount
  currency : CurrencyCode
  status : TransactionStatus
}

  operation deleteRideRequest(id : RideRequestId) : Boolean
}

Create a PostService with CRUD operations for posts, including search and filtering by authorId and tags.
taxi:
type PostId inherits String
type AuthorId inherits String
model Post {
  id : PostId
  authorId : AuthorId
  title : String
  content : String?
  tags : String[]
}
service PostService {
  operation create(post : Post) : Post
  operation read(id : PostId) : Post
  operation update(id : PostId, post : Post) : Post
  operation delete(id : PostId) : Boolean
  operation search(authorId : AuthorId?, tags : String[]) : Post[]
}
